title: Group Interviews of Youth Organisation Representatives 2015
description: This dataset contains 11 interviews with representatives of Finnish youth associations. The data were collected for the "Vetovoima" research project funded by the Ministry of Education and Culture. The objective of the project was to share best practices and to develop youth work. The interviews discussed developments of youth association work and what could be done to develop youth work further.
